title: opencode-btw Configuration
description: Configuration for the opencode-btw hint injection plugin

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE auto-completion

defaultPinned.description: Whether newly added hints are pinned (persistent) by default. When false, hints are transient and auto-clear after the model turn.

autoClear.description: Controls when transient hints are automatically cleared

onIdle.description: Auto-clear transient hints when the session goes idle (model finishes responding)

onQuestionTool.description: Auto-clear transient hints when the model uses the question tool

injection.description: Controls how and where hints are injected into the model's context

target.description: Where to inject hints: 'both' injects into system prompt AND user message, 'system' only into system prompt, 'user' only into user message

systemPromptPosition.description: Whether to prepend or append the hint block in the system prompt

systemInstructions.description: Custom framing text for the system prompt hint block. Set to null to use the built-in default. This replaces the '## Active User Preferences' section.

userMessagePrefix.description: Prefix for single-hint injection into user messages (e.g., 'BTW, ')

debug.description: Enable debug mode by default (verbose toast logging)

toastDuration.description: Default toast notification duration in milliseconds
